decisions.uiStrategy: integrate pi runtime into existing chat components
decisions.settingsStrategy: provider/model/thinking config editable in existing web settings
decisions.legacyStrategy: full replacement of existing AI agent logic after cutover validation
decisions.runtimeMixPolicy: no legacy and pi backend mix in main branch
decisions.cutoverPolicy: hard cutover with deletion of legacy backend agent code
decisions.upstreamUpdatePolicy: keep mario packages unmodified and adapt in local integration layer

containerPolicy: Always rebuild and recreate before manual test runs
Run app on port 3000 for manual tests

tasks.title: Create PI-first ADR with fixed non-goals and migration boundaries
Define canonical runtime owner modules for model, keys, tools, and sessions
Add @mariozechner/pi-ai and @mariozechner/pi-agent-core dependencies
Add temporary migration flag AI_AGENT_ENGINE for branch validation only (must be removed before merge)
Add typed PI runtime config schema (provider, model, thinking, enabled tools)
Extend agent runtime storage to persist PI config in /data/canvas-agent
Implement provider/model discovery helpers using pi-ai registry APIs
Update /api/agents/config contract to include PI fields and discovered model metadata
Update Agent Settings UI to edit provider, model, and thinking level for PI runtime
Add validation and clear errors for invalid provider/model combinations
Expand Agent Doctor checks for PI provider auth and model availability
Create server-only PI model resolver from stored config
Create server-only API key resolver for selected provider using existing env stores
Create PI tool registry with current workspace-safe tools
Implement new /api/stream endpoint compatible with pi-agent-core streamProxy protocol
Implement abort handling and partial message completion semantics
Implement unified error mapping for provider, auth, and tool execution failures
Define new DB/session persistence format for PI AgentMessage context
Implement serializer/deserializer for PI context snapshots
Update /api/sessions and /api/sessions/messages to load/save PI context data
Add migration path for legacy sessions (best effort transform or explicit cutover marker)
Keep provider-per-session pinning with PI model metadata
Integrate pi-agent-core into existing chat components without adopting pi-web-ui
Replace frontend parser logic to consume PI proxy stream events
Render text deltas, thinking blocks, and tool execution updates in current chat UI
Ensure attachment flow stays compatible with PI user-with-attachments messages
Implement resume/continue behavior against stored PI session context
Cut /api/chat over to PI runtime path
Delete legacy provider-specific chat branches (CLI/OpenRouter/Ollama custom stream code)
Remove obsolete runtime resolver paths not used by PI engine
Ensure no provider keys or oauth tokens are exposed in API responses, logs, or client state
Add input validation for PI stream request payloads and tool arguments
Add rate limits for new PI endpoints and keep existing auth gates
Add/refresh integration tests for PI stream endpoint and session persistence
Create Playwright e2e specs for login, provider/model update, chat send, session resume
Run full container-based manual regression protocol on port 3000
Remove runtime switching and keep PI-only backend runtime
Delete legacy chat routes and dead code after successful PI validation
Update README and operator docs for PI runtime operation and troubleshooting
Final acceptance sign-off against all must tasks and test protocol
Add CI guard to fail if legacy backend chat routes still exist
Add CI guard to fail on legacy agent runtime imports/usages
Add no-legacy grep checks into lint/test-all pipeline
Document upstream update workflow (version bump, changelog review, regression run)
Add policy doc: no direct source edits in mario packages; adapters first, temporary patch-package only if unavoidable
Remove temporary migration flag AI_AGENT_ENGINE and all legacy runtime env knobs
Switch sync-agent-todos to PI-only validate mode to unblock container rebuilds
Externalize @mariozechner/pi-ai and @mariozechner/pi-agent-core from Next server bundle
Bootstrap session creation in chat UI before first /api/stream call
Run container rebuild, integration checks, and Playwright regression for stream/session fixes
Fix second-turn PI chat regression by preserving structured assistant context in the existing chat UI
Polish PI chat UI rendering for markdown, tool cards, and session metadata
Show PI tool cards before the final assistant reply in the chat timeline
Compose the PI system prompt from managed agent markdown files with diagnostics and regression coverage
Add contextual provider help documentation in Agent Settings with collapsible UI
Add Ollama provider to PI discovery with custom model list and comprehensive documentation
Create integration tests for Ollama provider discovery and configuration
Add @-mention file picker dropdown in chat UI with workspace file listing
Add frontend auto-scan for image references in chat text before sending
Add backend message normalization to convert image paths to ImageContent
Test image auto-recognition with various image formats and paths
Implement vision model detection and filtering for non-vision models
Add image resize and compression on upload to reduce token usage
Add vision indicator in model selector UI
Add frontend warning when images are attached to non-vision models
Fix provider-specific OAuth flow with automatic/manual completion
tasks.description: Fixed OAuth flow to handle different provider behaviors: Anthropic requires manual code entry, while OpenAI/Copilot/Google have their own callback servers. Added new /api/oauth/pi/complete endpoint for automatic flows.

tasks.title: Define automation storage, scheduling, and protected API contracts
Implement automation persistence, scheduler startup hook, and PI runner with workspace artifacts
Build Automationen app UI and add suite entry
Add automation unit, integration, and API auth coverage
Verify Automationen UI flow with Playwright and finalize builds and commits
Harden internal automation execution auth and preview redirect handling
Persist optional automation target output path and expose effective output folders
tasks.description: Extended automation jobs and runs with configurable target output paths, added default/effective output path resolution, and updated the runner prompt plus run metadata so deliverables target the configured workspace folder while run artefacts stay under automationen/<job>/runs/.

tasks.title: Add target output path UI with workspace folder picker and split run output display
tasks.description: Extended the Automationen app with an optional target output path field, an existing-workspace directory picker, default target path preview, and separate UI sections for business result folders versus technical run artefacts.

tasks.title: Cover target output path behavior with tests and deployment documentation
tasks.description: Added default/effective output path assertions, extended the Automationen Playwright flow for the output path picker and workspace target directory, and documented that automation scheduling stays inside the app while /data/workspace remains the persistent mount for outputs.

tasks.title: Fix Automationen overview card overflow and width stability
tasks.description: Added min-width and overflow guards to the Automationen grid and cards, plus wrapping and truncation-safe job list content so long automation names and prompts no longer push the page wider on load.

tasks.title: Improve target output path UX with larger field and folder inspector picker
tasks.description: Expanded the target output path section with a larger textarea, clearer default/effective path presentation, stable folder-path output markers, and a hierarchical workspace folder inspector picker.

tasks.title: Refine workspace folder picker popup with shadcn collapsibles and collapsed default tree
tasks.description: Reworked the workspace folder picker popup to use shadcn collapsibles for the tree rows, kept the inspector layout, and changed the default state so directories start collapsed unless needed for the current selection or active search.

tasks.title: Open automation artifact files inside Notebook app and constrain log section height
tasks.description: Updated automation log/result links to open inside the Notebook app via /notebook?path=..., wired DashboardShell to auto-load a requested file path into the editor, and wrapped the log output in a fixed-height scroll area so long logs no longer make the page overly tall.

tasks.title: Make the automation overview list independently scrollable
tasks.description: Converted the active/paused automation overview column into a height-bounded scroll area so long job lists stay inside the card instead of stretching the whole page.

tasks.title: Clamp the overview scroll viewport to a stable visual height
tasks.description: Applied a direct max-height to the automation overview scroll viewport and added a UI assertion so the active/paused job list stays bounded even when the surrounding card layout grows.

tasks.title: Make the automation log panel collapsible
tasks.description: Wrapped the log viewer in a shadcn collapsible with an explicit toggle so the right-hand history column can be compressed without losing direct access to the raw log file.

tasks.title: Implement qmd background indexing for workspace search
tasks.description: Added qmd (Quick Markdown Search) integration with automatic background indexing. Includes: Bun and qmd installation in entrypoint, workspace collection setup with all file types (**/*), background loops for update (every 30 min) and embed (30 min after start, then daily at 01:00), logging with timestamps. Uses embeddinggemma-300M-Q8_0 model (~300MB) for semantic search.

tasks.title: Fix /skills docs modal viewport layout and scrolling on desktop and mobile
tasks.description: Added a viewport-based dialog layout mode, moved the skill docs popup to a height-bounded scrollable layout, fixed responsive desktop/mobile sizing, removed the duplicate close button, and added Playwright regression coverage for viewport fit and scroll behavior.

tasks.title: Clone Anthropic skills repository and extract 10 target skills
tasks.description: Cloned https://github.com/anthropics/skills/ and extracted algorithmic-art, brand-guidelines, canvas-design, doc-coauthoring, docx, internal-comms, pdf, pptx, skill-creator, xlsx into /data/skills/

tasks.title: Create new Anthropic-compatible skill schema with YAML frontmatter parser
tasks.description: Created skill-manifest-anthropic.ts with SKILL.md format support, YAML frontmatter parser, and AnthropicSkill interface. Skills now use frontmatter with name, description, license fields.

tasks.title: Rewrite skill-loader.ts to only support SKILL.md format
tasks.description: Rewrote skill-loader.ts to only support Anthropic-style SKILL.md format. Removed backward compatibility with old manifest.json format.

tasks.title: Convert existing Canvas skills to SKILL.md format
tasks.description: Converted image-generation, video-generation, ad-localization, qmd from manifest.json+README.md to SKILL.md format. Deleted old manifest.json and README.md files.

tasks.title: Extend system prompt composition to include active skills context
tasks.description: Modified system-prompt.ts and system-prompt-shared.ts to include enabled skills context in PI Agent system prompt. Skills are now automatically loaded and their instructions added to the context.

tasks.title: Add enabledSkills array to PI runtime config
tasks.description: Extended PiRuntimeConfig interface with enabledSkills: string[] field. Empty array means all skills enabled by default. Updated DEFAULT_PI_CONFIG and validation.

tasks.title: Create API endpoints for skill enable/disable/status
tasks.description: Created /api/skills/[name]/enable, /api/skills/[name]/disable, and /api/skills/status endpoints for managing skill activation state.

tasks.title: Create SkillToggle component with shadcn Switch
tasks.description: Created SkillsPageClient.tsx with SkillToggle component using shadcn/ui Switch. Skills can be enabled/disabled from the Skill Gallery UI. Added stats display (total/enabled/disabled).

tasks.title: Update SkillDetailDialog for SKILL.md format
tasks.description: Updated SkillDetailDialog.tsx to display AnthropicSkill format. Shows YAML frontmatter fields (name, description, license, compatibility) and renders full SKILL.md content with ReactMarkdown.

tasks.title: Remove create_skill and validate_skill tools from tool-registry.ts
tasks.description: Removed custom create_skill and validate_skill tools from tool-registry.ts. Anthropic skill-creator skill replaces our custom implementation.

tasks.title: Run build and verify integration
tasks.description: Successfully ran npm run build with no TypeScript errors. All 10 Anthropic skills (algorithmic-art, brand-guidelines, canvas-design, doc-coauthoring, docx, internal-comms, pdf, pptx, skill-creator, xlsx) are now available in the Skill Gallery.

tasks.title: Install @eigenpal/docx-js-editor Package
tasks.description: npm install @eigenpal/docx-js-editor and import styles

tasks.title: Create new DocxEditor.tsx component
tasks.description: Wrapper for @eigenpal/docx-js-editor with dynamic import for Next.js SSR compatibility

tasks.title: Update OfficeEditor.tsx for DOCX
tasks.description: Remove mammoth/univerjs for DOCX, keep XLSX with @univerjs, use DocxEditor for .docx files

tasks.title: Create API endpoint for DOCX file loading
tasks.description: GET /api/files/docx?path=... returns buffer as base64

tasks.title: Implement save functionality
tasks.description: onChange callback in DocxEditor, save to draft, Update Changes button

tasks.title: Test the integration
tasks.description: Open DOCX, edit text, save, verify formatting

tasks.title: Remove @univerjs DOCX plugins and old DocxViewer (cleanup)
tasks.description: Remove @univerjs/docs and @univerjs/docs-ui from OfficeEditor, delete old DocxViewer.tsx

tasks.title: Install Jspreadsheet CE Packages
tasks.description: npm install jspreadsheet-ce jsuites @jspreadsheet/react, import styles

tasks.title: Create SpreadsheetEditor.tsx component
tasks.description: Wrapper for Jspreadsheet with React, support XLSX and CSV, ref forwarding for save()

tasks.title: Implement XLSX/CSV Loading
tasks.description: Use SheetJS to parse XLSX/CSV files, convert to Jspreadsheet JSON format, support multiple worksheets

tasks.title: Implement Save Functionality
tasks.description: onChange callback, convert back to XLSX/CSV, Update Changes button, save to draft then file

tasks.title: Update OfficeEditor.tsx for spreadsheets
tasks.description: Remove @univerjs for XLSX/CSV, use SpreadsheetEditor for .xlsx, .csv, .xls

tasks.title: Update FileEditor.tsx file type detection
tasks.description: Update file type detection: XLSX, XLS, CSV → SpreadsheetEditor, remove old @univerjs logic

tasks.title: Implement Formula Support
tasks.description: Enable Jspreadsheet formula engine, support SUM, AVERAGE, COUNT, MAX, MIN, real-time calculation

tasks.title: Implement Formatting Features
tasks.description: Cell styling (colors, fonts), text alignment, number formats (currency, percent, date), column widths and row heights

tasks.title: Implement CSV Support
tasks.description: CSV import via SheetJS, CSV export with correct delimiters, UTF-8 encoding handling

tasks.title: Remove @univerjs packages (cleanup)
tasks.description: Remove all @univerjs/* packages from package.json, remove CSS imports, reduce bundle size by ~2MB

tasks.title: Test the integration
tasks.description: Open XLSX with formulas, edit cells and save, open CSV, test formatting and formulas, verify save/load

tasks.title: Update documentation
tasks.description: Update README with new features, document supported formulas, update Changelog

tasks.title: Install pptx-preview package
tasks.description: npm install pptx-preview for frontend PPTX viewing

tasks.title: Create PptxViewer.tsx component
tasks.description: Create PptxViewer component with slide navigation, dynamic import for code-splitting

tasks.title: Update FileEditor.tsx for PPTX support
tasks.description: Add 'pptx' to OFFICE_EXTENSIONS, add PPTX case handling in FileEditor

tasks.title: Update OfficeEditor.tsx for PPTX
tasks.description: Add PPTX branch with PptxViewer component in OfficeEditor

tasks.title: Test PPTX viewer
tasks.description: Test with sample PPTX file, verify slide navigation, charts rendering, text readability

tasks.title: Update todo list and commit
tasks.description: Mark all PPTX tasks as completed, commit changes

tasks.title: Add Python dependencies to Dockerfile for skills
tasks.description: Added openpyxl, pypdf, pdfplumber, pdf2image, Pillow, defusedxml, lxml, PyYAML to Dockerfile runner stage

tasks.title: Improve table rendering styles in DocxEditor
tasks.description: Added CSS overrides for table borders, cell padding, alternating row colors, and overflow handling in DocxEditor.tsx

tasks.title: Add PI usage tracking todos and ledger schema/bootstrap
tasks.description: Add ordered usage analytics tasks, introduce pi_usage_events schema, and extend SQLite bootstrap for new ledger storage.

tasks.title: Persist usage ledger events from PI stream completions and aborts
tasks.description: Extract assistant usage from new PI turn messages, deduplicate by fingerprint, and store per-message usage events in pi_usage_events.

tasks.title: Expose usage analytics summary and event APIs with role-aware filters
tasks.description: Add /api/usage/summary and /api/usage/events with date/provider/model/session filters and admin-only cross-user access.

tasks.title: Add chat usage footer and dedicated /usage analytics UI
tasks.description: Render compact per-answer token/cost footers in chat and add a filterable /usage page plus navigation entry.

tasks.title: Cover usage tracking with unit, integration, and Playwright checks
tasks.description: Add targeted tests for usage extraction, aggregation, API authorization, chat UI display, and /usage filtering.

tasks.title: Run build and finalize PI usage tracking changes
tasks.description: Run npm run build plus targeted usage tests, update todo statuses, and commit the completed usage tracking work.

tasks.title: Create API Route POST /api/workflow-automation/create for job creation
tasks.description: Create API endpoint to create automation jobs with name, prompt, schedule parameters. Uses existing automation store.

tasks.title: Create API Route GET /api/workflow-automation/jobs for listing jobs
tasks.description: Create API endpoint to list all automation jobs with filtering options.

tasks.title: Create API Route PATCH /api/workflow-automation/jobs/[id] for updating jobs
tasks.description: Create API endpoint to update job parameters (pause/resume/edit).

tasks.title: Create API Route DELETE /api/workflow-automation/jobs/[id] for deleting jobs
tasks.description: Create API endpoint to delete automation jobs.

tasks.title: Create API Route POST /api/workflow-automation/jobs/[id]/trigger for manual execution
tasks.description: Create API endpoint to manually trigger automation job execution.

tasks.title: Create Skill Manifest skills/workflow-automation/manifest.json
tasks.description: Create skill manifest defining the workflow-automation tool with parameters for create, list, update, delete, trigger operations.

tasks.title: Extend Skills CLI /data/skills/skill with workflow-automation command
tasks.description: Add workflow-automation subcommand to the skills CLI script with support for create, list, update, delete, trigger operations.

tasks.title: Extend Tool Registry with automation job tools
tasks.description: Add create_automation_job, list_automation_jobs, update_automation_job, delete_automation_job, trigger_automation_job tools to piTools registry.

tasks.title: Run build and test workflow automation skill
tasks.description: Run npm run build to verify no TypeScript errors, then test the workflow automation skill in the UI.

tasks.title: Introduce session-bound PI live runtime with stream status and control endpoints
tasks.description: Add in-memory PI runtime management per user/session plus /api/stream, /api/stream/status, and /api/stream/control support for live status, abort, steering, follow-up queueing, replace, and compact actions.

tasks.title: Update Canvas chat UI to render PI work state, queue controls, and context meter
tasks.description: Show live PI runtime state in the chat, replace the local pseudo-queue with server-driven queue controls, expose stop/steer/send-now/compact actions, and display approximate context-budget usage for the active session.

tasks.title: Add regression coverage for PI runtime status, compact, and chat queue UX
tasks.description: Extend PI integration coverage for runtime status and compact control, and add Playwright regression coverage for visible agent work state, queue rendering, and context budget UI.

tasks.title: Promote PI work-state into a sticky runtime banner with clearer activity signaling
tasks.description: Replace the subtle runtime pill with a prominent sticky banner, add colored pulse states, and keep queue plus context budget visible in the banner.

tasks.title: Collapse completed PI tool calls into expandable accordion cards
tasks.description: Render tool calls with compact headers and previews, keep active tools expanded, auto-collapse completed calls, and allow manual re-expansion in the chat timeline.

tasks.title: Surface Canvas compaction markers and runtime metadata in PI chat
tasks.description: Track manual and automatic compaction timestamps in runtime status, emit context_compacted events, and render visible compaction break markers in the chat UI.

tasks.title: Compress the mobile chat chrome and add productive starter prompts
tasks.description: Move session and model metadata out of the permanent mobile header into a collapsible runtime details panel, compact the mobile composer and quick actions, add shared business-focused starter prompts for fresh chats and the home launch card, widen the prompt cards, keep the empty-state prompt rail clear of the fixed composer on mobile, restore a fuller desktop context display with a colored busy badge, place the full context budget label directly into the top runtime action row, give that badge more horizontal padding, render a green ready dot and a red blinking busy dot inside the badge itself, avoid duplicate ready/context labels by rendering the status through the badge only, and prevent runtime polling updates from forcing the chat back to the bottom while the user scrolls history.
